name: Sky Striker Mecharmory - Hercules Base
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>閃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>構</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ハーキュリーベース
desc: Activate this card only if you control no monsters in your Main Monster Zone. The equipped monster cannot attack directly. It can make a second attack on monsters during each Battle Phase. If the equipped monster destroys a monster by its attack while you have 3 or more Spells in your GY: Draw 1 card. If this card is sent from the field to the GY by a card effect: You can target up to 3 "Sky Striker" cards in your GY, except "Sky Striker Mecharmory - Hercules Base"; shuffle them into the Deck.
eff: Activate this card only if you control no monsters in your Main Monster Zone. The equipped monster cannot attack directly. It can make a second attack on monsters during each Battle Phase. If the equipped monster destroys a monster by its attack while you have 3 or more Spells in your GY: Draw 1 card. If this card is sent from the field to the GY by a card effect: You can target up to 3 "Sky Striker" cards in your GY, except "Sky Striker Mecharmory - Hercules Base"; shuffle them into the Deck.

eff_types: Activation requirement, Continuous-like, Continuous-like, Trigger-like, Trigger-like
action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
misc: Requires control of no monsters in the Main Monster Zone
